status: frozen after a successful first-run preflight and before either V13 replay output root, database, cache, ledger, or prediction existed
classification: dual zero-model local retrieval/render replay over reused V7 compiler artifacts on consumed LongMemEval-S dev42; not fresh end-to-end, untouched, heldout, third-party, scored, or publishable
purpose: require two independently cloned all-42 prediction runs to reproduce byte-canonical top-20, top-50, and full payloads before any paid evaluation is considered

content_review_policy.human_tuning_from_failures: allowed only as explicitly labeled consumed-development analysis and must remain generic

namespaces.database_scope_rule: Both runs retain exact V7 run ID v7m42a1 because database users are longmemeval_<question_id>_v7m42a1. Project names isolate prediction files; independent SQLite backups isolate database state.

fixed_retrieval_and_harness.dataset: hash-pinned local dev42 materialization; no download

zero_model_guards.mutations: add, finalize, and delete rejected; no update or backfill route exists
zero_model_guards.search_precondition: every registered current source in the requested scope has a complete or disclosed partial job under the exact V7 fingerprint
zero_model_guards.predict_only_external_network: closed proxy on port 9 with localhost exempted
zero_model_guards.credential_policy: no credential is required, recorded, or permitted

execution_state_machine.name: first_preflight_and_frozen_inputs
execution_state_machine.rule: verify the first-run SHA256SUMS, verify-preflight with fresh_state_verified=true, all V13/V7/harness/helper hashes, source secret scan, and both absent roots before creating first-run state

execution_state_machine.name: first_all42_replay
execution_state_machine.rule: clone V7 with SQLite backup, copy exactly 42 ingestion checkpoints and zero predictions, run the credential-free readiness migration, probe all 42 scopes, run one all-42 predict-only replay with no selective retry, prove database counts and checkpointed hash unchanged during prediction, audit all cutoffs, and freeze exactly 84 JSON files

execution_state_machine.name: first_freeze_and_self_canonicalization
execution_state_machine.rule: seal the first prediction manifest, audit, freeze metadata, database invariants, and zero-sidecar assertions; verify the pinned comparator and its tests; then compare two differently labeled references to the same frozen first prediction directory with 42/42 expectations at top20, top50, and full to derive immutable first-run canonical aggregate hashes

execution_state_machine.name: repeat_specific_precommit
execution_state_machine.rule: while the repeat1 root and all repeat1 sidecars are still absent, create and verify benchmark_records/reproduction-v13-replay-repeat1-20260716 with exact hashes for the frozen first artifacts and first self-comparison, plus a fresh repeat1 run config, command manifest, and successful reproduction preflight

execution_state_machine.name: repeat1_all42_replay
execution_state_machine.rule: use a new SQLite backup, repeat1 project name, output root, and port 8894; otherwise execute the same fixed source, harness, helper, dataset, split, V7 run ID, parameters, all-42 scope, audit, and no-retry rules

execution_state_machine.name: cross_run_comparison
execution_state_machine.rule: using the pinned comparator, require exactly 42/42 identical questions at top20, top50, and full; require both variant aggregate hashes at every cutoff to equal the first-run hashes bound in the repeat-specific precommit

execution_state_machine.name: disposition
execution_state_machine.rule: on success preserve both freezes and the comparison as zero-model consumed-development reproducibility evidence; on any failure preserve all artifacts, mark V13 blocked, and perform no scoring or selective retry

variants.v13-first-b: the same frozen first prediction directory

first_self_comparison_derivation.canonicalization: remove only retrieval.search_latency_ms; slice only retrieval.search_results for top20/top50; preserve every other field for full; UTF-8 sorted compact JSON with allow_nan=false
required_derived_bindings: SHA-256 of the first PREDICTION_SHA256SUMS file
SHA-256 of first prediction-freeze-metadata.json and its freeze manifest
SHA-256 and internal final_report_sha256 of v13-first-self-comparison.json
v13-first-a aggregate_sha256 for top20, top50, and full
first database post-migration and post-prediction hashes and count-comparison SHA-256
proof that compiler cache and compiler usage sidecars are absent

repeat_specific_precommit_rule.status_at_this_freeze: intentionally not created because the first prediction artifacts do not yet exist
repeat_specific_precommit_rule.fairness_reason: creating a repeat binding before actual first artifacts exist would require placeholders; creating it after repeat state exists would permit post-hoc substitution
repeat_specific_precommit_rule.creation_window: after the complete first freeze and self-comparison, but before creation of the repeat1 output root, database, cache, ledger, or prediction directory
repeat_specific_precommit_rule.repeat_command_derivation: start from the hash-verified first commands.json; replace the complete first output-root string with the complete repeat1 output-root string, then replace the first project-name string with the repeat1 project-name string, then replace backend port 8893 with 8894; prepend verification of this protocol, the first freeze manifest, prediction audit, prediction freeze metadata, comparator files, self-comparison, and first-run-bindings; no other command or parameter change is permitted
repeat_specific_precommit_rule.preflight_requirement: the same reproduction_manifest preflight must pass with repeat1 database/cache/ledger/root paths absent and the exact V13 source, harness commit, dataset, question IDs, repeat run config, and repeat command manifest bound

promotion_rule.permitted_label_after_success: V13 zero-model deterministic replay over reused V7 compiler artifacts on consumed LongMemEval-S dev42
promotion_rule.paid_evaluation: blocked until every success gate passes and a separate immutable paid-evaluation protocol is frozen

failure_rule: Any missing file, hash mismatch, dirty harness, occupied namespace, incomplete scope, sidecar creation, network/model call, selective retry, audit failure, database mutation, or canonical mismatch preserves the attempt as a failure and blocks scoring. V12 artifacts are read-only and must never be overwritten.
